name: ios-dev
description: Lunettiq iPad app — Expo + React Native + WatermelonDB. Consumes Foundry API. Scoped to app/feature code only.
welcomeMessage:
Lunettiq iPad agent ready. Expo Router + TanStack Query + WatermelonDB. Say 'create feature X' to start a buildflow, or 'use #10-foundry-api' for the API contract.

Note: This agent is scoped to app/ and src/ code. Infrastructure changes require the primary agent.
